simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, le_of_lt] <;>
      nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y, abs_mul_abs_self x, abs_mul_abs_self y]
    have h₁₆ : (y - x) ^ 2 * |y + 2 * x| ≤ (y - x) ^ 2 * (3 * |x| + 1) := by
      have h₁₆₁ : 0 ≤ (y - x) ^ 2 := by positivity
      have h₁₆₂ : |y + 2 * x| ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := h₁₅
      nlinarith
    have h₁₇ : (y - x) ^ 2 * (3 * |x| + 1) < 1 * (3 * |x| + 1) := by
      have h₁₇₁ : 0 ≤ (y - x) ^ 2 := by positivity
      have h₁₇₂ : (y - x) ^ 2 < 1 := h₈
      have h₁₇₃ : 0 < 3 * |x| + 1 := by positivity
      nlinarith
    have h₁₈ : 1 * (3 * |x| + 1) = 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring
    have h₁₉ : (y - x) ^ 2 * (3 * |x| + 1) < 3 * |x| + 1 := by linarith
    have h₂₀ : |y - x| < ε / (3 * |x| + 1) := h₆
    have h₂₁ : (y - x) ^ 2 < (ε / (3 * |x| + 1)) ^ 2 := by
      have h₂₁₁ : 0 ≤ (y - x) ^ 2 := by positivity
      have h₂₁₂ : |y - x| < ε / (3 * |x| + 1) := h₆
      have h₂₁₃ : 0 ≤ ε / (3 * |x| + 1) := by positivity
      have h₂₁₄ : (y - x) ^ 2 < (ε / (3 * |x| + 1)) ^ 2 := by
        have h₂₁₅ : |y - x| < ε / (3 * |x| + 1) := h₆
        have h₂₁₆ : (y - x) ^ 2 < (ε / (3 * |x| + 1)) ^ 2 := by
          calc
            (y - x) ^ 2 = |y - x| ^ 2 := by
              simp [sq_abs]
            _ < (ε / (3 * |x| + 1)) ^ 2 := by
              have h₂₁₇ : |y - x| < ε / (3 * |x| + 1) := h₆
              have h₂₁₈ : 0 ≤ |y - x| := abs_nonneg _
              have h₂₁₉ : 0 ≤ ε / (3 * |x| + 1) := by positivity
              nlinarith [abs_nonneg (y - x)]
            _ = (ε / (3 * |x| + 1)) ^ 2 := by ring
        exact h₂₁₆
      exact h₂₁₄
    have h₂₂ : (y - x) ^ 2 * (3 * |x| + 1) < ε := by
      have h₂₂₁ : (y - x) ^ 2 < (ε / (3 * |x| + 1)) ^ 2 := h₂₁
      have h₂₂₂ : 0 < 3 * |x| + 1 := by positivity
      have h₂₂₃ : (y - x) ^ 2 * (3 * |x| + 1) < (ε / (3 * |x| + 1)) ^ 2 * (3 * |x| + 1) := by
        nlinarith
      have h₂₂₄ : (ε / (3 * |x| + 1)) ^ 2 * (3 * |x| + 1) = (ε ^ 2) / (3 * |x| + 1) := by
        field_simp [h₂₂₂.ne']
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> field_simp [h₂₂₂.ne']
        <;> ring_nf
      have h₂₂₅ : (ε ^ 2) / (3 * |x| + 1) ≤ ε := by
        have h₂₂₅₁ : 0 < 3 * |x| + 1 := by positivity
        have h₂₂₅₂ : (ε : ℝ) > 0 := by positivity
        have h₂₂₅₃ : (ε : ℝ) ^ 2 ≤ ε * (3 * |x| + 1) := by
          have h₂₂₅₄ : ε ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by
            have h₂₂₅₅ : |y - x| < ε / (3 * |x| + 1) := h₆
            have h₂₂₅₆ : 0 < 3 * |x| + 1 := by positivity
            have h₂₂₅₇ : |y - x| * (3 * |x| + 1) < ε := by
              calc
                |y - x| * (3 * |x| + 1) < (ε / (3 * |x| + 1)) * (3 * |x| + 1) := by
                  gcongr
                  <;> linarith
                _ = ε := by
                  field_simp [h₂₂₅₆.ne']
                  <;> linarith
            have h₂₂₅₈ : |y - x| * (3 * |x| + 1) < ε := by linarith
            have h₂₂₅₉ : |y - x| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg _
            nlinarith [abs_nonneg (y - x)]
          nlinarith [sq_nonneg ε]
        have h₂₂₅₄ : (ε : ℝ) ^ 2 / (3 * |x| + 1) ≤ ε := by
          rw [div_le_iff (by positivity)]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h₂₂₆ : (y - x) ^ 2 * (3 * |x| + 1) < ε := by
        calc
          (y - x) ^ 2 * (3 * |x| + 1) < (ε / (3 * |x| + 1)) ^ 2 * (3 * |x| + 1) := by
            exact h₂₂₃
          _ = (ε ^ 2) / (3 * |x| + 1) := by
            rw [h₂₂₄]
          _ ≤ ε := by
            exact h₂₂₅
          _ = ε := by ring
      linarith
    have h₂₃ : (y - x) ^ 2 * |y + 2 * x| ≤ ε := by
      calc
        (y - x) ^ 2 * |y + 2 * x| ≤ (y - x) ^ 2 * (3 * |x| + 1) := by
          exact h₁₆
        _ < ε := by
          exact h₂₂
        _ ≤ ε := by linarith
    linarith
